title: phyllanthus scabrifolius
intro: Phyllanthus scabrifolius, also known as the rough-leaved phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus scabrifolius include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, skin disorders, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Phyllanthus scabrifolius is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and may also be found in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
